# Glow Lab Protocols
> Premium research peptides and peptide blends — 99%+ purity, third-party tested. For research use only.

Glow Lab Protocols (https://glowlabprotocols.com) is an online store for research-grade peptides and topicals. Every batch is third-party tested for identity and purity. Products ship fast and discreet; priority shipping is $15 and free on orders over $250.

## Research peptides
BPC-157, Tirzepatide (10 mg / 20 mg), Retatrutide (10 mg / 20 mg), Tesamorelin + Ipamorelin, KLOW blend (GHK-Cu, BPC-157, TB-500, KPV), GHK-Cu, Glutathione (750 mg / 1500 mg), PT-141, Selank, SS-31, AICAR, 5-Amino-1MQ, NAD+, MOTS-C, KPV, DSIP, Adamax (5 mg / 10 mg), Thymosin Alpha-1, BAC water.

## Skincare & topicals
Glow Topicals (Protocol 01, Protocol 02), Rose Recovery Mist, Cu-Hair 01, Cu-Hair 02.

## Standards
- 99%+ purity, third-party tested on every batch
- Lyophilized powder; store at -20 C; reconstitute with bacteriostatic water
- Discreet, fast shipping — free over $250
- RESEARCH USE ONLY. NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION.

orders@glowlabprotocols.com
